params.name: The Kiss
params.description: The Kiss is one of the most famous works by sculptor Rodin, depicting the love story of Paolo and Francesca from Dante's Divine Comedy, who are eternally punished for their forbidden love, yet their passionate kiss becomes an immortal moment. This sculpture is renowned worldwide for its bold expression and profound insight into human emotions, transcending time and space, becoming a classic symbol of love and desire. The original is housed in the Rodin Museum in Paris, with replicas of the work  …
